title: Front Office Manager - Hyatt India - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Hyatt India - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Hyatt India! We are hiring a Front Office Manager for our Faridabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Hyatt India:
Hyatt India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hyatt India!
